case_title: VIAN CHARBONNEAU VS. ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY et. al.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-26-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK : P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506) NO EXHIBITS RETAINED.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHARBONNEAU, VIAN AS TO DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARBONNEAU, VIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY BURTON, AMOURA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
